paragraphs.text: A 20-row feature matrix comparing networking capabilities across all five Nucleon Cloud tiers. Numeric specs are tabulated in monospaced columns; text designations are left-aligned for readability.

Independent side-by-side comparison of five Nucleon Cloud hosting tiers.
        Specs sourced from public tier sheets, updated quarterly.

visibleText: Nucleon Cloud // benchmark overview compute-plans storage-addons network-features cost-calculator ~/benchmark / network-features Network Features Matrix A 20-row feature matrix comparing networking capabilities across all five Nucleon Cloud tiers. Numeric specs are tabulated in monospaced columns; text designations are left-aligned for readability. Nano Micro Standard Pro Enterprise Network Capability Nano Micro Standard Pro Enterprise IPv4 / IPv6 dual-stack ✓ IPv4 ✓ Dual ✓ Dual ✓ Dual ✓ Dual + /64 Private VLAN ✗ ✗ ✓ Shared ✓ Dedicated ✓ Multi-VLAN DDoS protection tier Basic Basic Advanced Advanced Enterprise CDN edge nodes 12 24 68 142 280 Global load balancer ✗ ✗ ✓ Regional ✓ Multi-region ✓ Global anycast Anycast DNS ✗ ✓ 4 PoP ✓ 12 PoP ✓ 32 PoP ✓ 64 PoP BGP sessions 0 0 2 8 32 Port speed (Mbps) 100 200 1,000 10,000 25,000 Monthly egress included (TB) 0.5 2 10 50 500 Overage per GB (USD) $0.090 $0.075 $0.050 $0.030 $0.012 Firewall rules limit 25 50 200 1,000 10,000 VPN gateway ✗ ✓ IPsec ✓ IPsec ✓ IPsec + WG ✓ HA cluster Private peering ✗ ✗ ✗ ✓ 1 Gbps ✓ 10 Gbps Latency SLA (ms) < 80 < 50 < 25 < 10 < 3 Geo-restriction rules 0 5 25 100 Unlimited TLS termination Self-managed Self-managed Managed Managed + mTLS HSM-backed Floating IP allocations 1 2 8 32 128 Network ACL groups 2 5 20 75 500 Traffic mirroring ✗ ✗ ✓ Sampled ✓ Full ✓ Full + retention Service uptime SLA (%) 99.50 99.90 99.95 99.99 99.999 Note: Port speed values reflect committed line rate at the hypervisor NIC. Burstable throughput above committed rate is permitted up to 2× for 30-second windows on Standard and above. Egress overage is billed monthly in 1 GB increments. Latency SLAs are measured P95 within a single availability zone. Nucleon Cloud Benchmark Independent side-by-side comparison of five Nucleon Cloud hosting tiers. Specs sourced from public tier sheets, updated quarterly.
